titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/12

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=276 status=live modified=2021-04-04 14:50:00.571427+00 | translation moa=277 status=live modified=2021-04-04 14:50:02.545372+00

p.cl: W. de lindeseia . Omnibus ecclesie filiis salutem .

Sciant tam posteri quam presentes . me dedisse et presenti carta
confirmasse deo et sancte Marie de Mailros . et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus fauope sicut aqua ledre
uadit . et sicut sepes includit . in perpetuam elemosinam  pro anima patris mei et matris et omnium paren
tum meorum et anima mea .

Hiis testibus . Anfredo abbate de Neubotila Swano filio thor . Drogone de
lindeseia . Swano de ercedun . Willelmo …ueles . Cospatricio de Ercedun
William of Lindsay to all sons of the Church Greeting:

Let those to come as well as those present know that I have given and by the present charter have made firm to God and to St Mary at Melrose and to the monks serving God there Fauhope as Leader Water runs and as the hedge encloses, in perpetual alms, for the soul of my father and my mother and of all my ancestors and my own soul.
With these witnesses, Amfred the abbot of Newbattle, Swain the son of Thor, Drogo of Lindsay, Swain of Earlston, William …, Cospatric of Earlston.
